summary: Iteration 30: Production Debugging & Verification Console - All features tested and working. Backend: 35/35 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 tabs verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Debug Console at /api/internal/debug is fully functional. All 4 tabs work: Live Trace (with filters), Errors Only, Entity Inspector, Verification Checklist (36 items). Auth gate requires DEBUG_SECRET bearer token. Known document IDs for testing: doc_1057cdb1c89d, doc_4ea1e9124d2b.

auth_gate.details: Shows login form, accepts DEBUG_SECRET, rejects wrong secret with 401

live_trace_tab.details: Loads traces table with columns (Time, Method, Endpoint, Action, User, Entity, Outcome, Duration, RID). Expand (+) button shows detail JSON with request_summary, response_summary, service_chain, db_mutations, side_effects.

errors_only_tab.details: Only shows non-success traces. No filters shown. 16 error traces visible.

entity_inspector_tab.details: Form renders with entity type dropdown (8 types: document, quote, invoice, vault_document, client, change_request, decision, user) and ID input. Inspecting doc_1057cdb1c89d returns current state, traces, state transitions, change requests.

verification_tab.details: Loads 36-item checklist with pass/fail/untested dropdowns. Status update via PUT API works. Shows stats badges (2 passed, 0 failed, 34 untested).

filter_dropdowns.details: Outcome filter, method filter, and action search all work correctly on Live Trace tab.

static_assets.details: CSS at /api/internal/debug/css/styles.css, JS files at /api/internal/debug/js/*.js all served correctly.

debug_health_endpoint.details: Returns trace count (75 traces), status ok, and collection names.

auto_refresh_checkbox.details: Checkbox exists and is toggleable. Initial state unchecked, toggles to checked.

backend_tests_summary.TestDebugAuth: 5/5 passed - Auth gate tests (401 without token, 401 with wrong token, 200 with valid token)
backend_tests_summary.TestDebugHealth: 2/2 passed - Health endpoint returns trace count and collections
backend_tests_summary.TestDebugTraces: 7/7 passed - Traces list, limit, errors_only, method filter, outcome filter, action filter, structure
backend_tests_summary.TestDebugEntityInspector: 5/5 passed - Document inspection, invalid entity type, nonexistent entity, client, change_request
backend_tests_summary.TestDebugVerifications: 5/5 passed - List 36 items, item structure, update status, invalid status, nonexistent item
backend_tests_summary.TestDebugStaticAssets: 6/6 passed - HTML, CSS, JS files served correctly
backend_tests_summary.TestDebugPathTraversal: 5/5 passed - Path traversal blocked for JS and CSS routes
